title: Professional Welding Equipment EU | Billik Trade Slovakia
description: Professional welding equipment and supplies from Billik Trade, Nitra, Slovakia. MIG, TIG, MMA welders, helmets, consumables. 30+ years of expertise. EU shipping available.
subtitle: Trusted by welders across Europe since 1992
paragraphs: Billik Trade s.r.o. is a Slovak welding specialist with over three decades of experience in welding technology, metal fabrication, and industrial supplies. From our base in Nitra, we supply professional-grade welders, cutting equipment, and consumables across Slovakia and the EU.
We distribute leading brands including IWELD and our own Billik welding machines. Every product in our range is tested in real workshop conditions — we only sell equipment we would use ourselves.

Whether you run an industrial production line or a home workshop, our team provides expert advice in English and Slovak. Orders are dispatched within 24 hours, and we offer warranty and post-warranty service at our Nitra facility.

benefits.title: Proven reliability
benefits.description: Equipment tested by professionals in demanding conditions.

benefits.title: Expert advice
benefits.description: 30 years of welding expertise at your service.

benefits.title: Fast dispatch
benefits.description: Orders shipped within 24 hours from our Nitra warehouse.

benefits.title: Full service
benefits.description: Warranty and post-warranty repair at our service centre.

faqs.question: Do you ship welding equipment within the EU?
faqs.answer: Yes, Billik Trade ships across Slovakia and to EU countries. Contact us for a shipping quote and product availability for your region.

faqs.question: What welding brands do you carry?
faqs.answer: We stock IWELD, Billik, and other proven brands covering MIG/MAG, TIG, MMA, and plasma cutting equipment.

faqs.question: Where is Billik Trade located?
faqs.answer: Our headquarters and showroom are at Priemyselná 4, 949 01 Nitra, Slovakia. We are open Monday to Friday, 7:00–16:30.
